name: 克莱尔·阿吉乌斯
name_full: 克莱尔·阿吉乌斯 Clare Agius
introduction: Clare Agius is an Actress, TV Present and Producer who has been acting and hosting TV programmes, Events and Festivals since 1997 establishing herself professionally as one of Malta's leading personality.She formed her first business company - Clare Agius Media Productions in 2003 and learned how to operate in the business world with the initial guidance of a business mentor.With thousands of aired programmes to her name, she has developed a skill of interviewing people and making them feel at ease in front of the cameras while bringing out the best in them. To date she has produced and presented most of her shows with great success and following and is renowned for her 'Natural Flair' of presenting. Successively she has hosted daily shows, one to one interviews, documentaries, and lately her most vibrant and talked about all female show 'Ilsien in-nisa' which she created and launched in October 2011.As an actress, after receiving her theatre education at M.T.A.D.A. (1990-1995), Clare has been lead performing and collaborating in theatre work both locally and abroad during theatre festivals and tours. As an actress on TV, she has remained renowned for her outstanding and memorable performance as Rita in 'Madonna tac-Coqqa'. Her international work include prominent roles in BBC's Roman Mysteries, Polish TV's main drama Kryminalni, her latest role in 'Simshar' the film and ongoing theatre ethnography 'I could be anyone' which she's performed in the UK and now in USA.Clare has been doing yoga since the age of 20 and enjoys a healthy way of life. This led her to open her second business venture in 2008 - a Traditional Chinese Massage clinic which extends her philosophy of life to the public.Clare has done several courses for her personal growth including Emotional Freedom Technique, Pranic Healing, several Yoga Courses and has also completed her Yoga Teacher Training Course in Germany - October 2010.Clare has had a long time passion for flying and in August 2009 she completed her studies and became a holder of a Private Pilot's license. Today she flies Cessnas 152 and 172 as a past time.
